Video.summary: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep their passengers safe.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Fight or Flight

Video.summary: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Video.summary: Tragedy strikes as best friends Ed Cohen and Ken Henderson are stranded adrift in hostile waters.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story
Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story
Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story

Video.summary: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard
Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard
Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: It’s exhilarating. It’s heart-wrenching. Mark and other storm hunters dive head first into some of the most destructive and deadly hurricanes to hit the US mainland in this millennium.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes
Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes
Storm Hunters | Monster Hurricanes

Video.summary: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.
Video.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild

Image.alt: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
Angry Planet | Italia Wild
Angry Planet | Italia Wild
